_schema: Canon C65 — Gaianite Substrate Quantum Properties
_note: This is the schema stub. Values are populated by run_ysz_simulation().
known_limitations: Cluster model (Zr1Y1O3) truncates long-range periodic effects.
Active space restricted to 6e/6o for CPU statevector tractability.
Phonon Hessian uses finite differences; anharmonic terms neglected.
Dielectric constants estimated via Clausius-Mossotti; not from DFPT.
